requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Environmental Controls — HCFC Phase-down and Low-GWP Transition (Montreal Protocol)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂环保管制——HCFC逐步淘汰与低GWP转型（蒙特利尔议定书）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑環保管制——HCFC逐步淘汰與低GWP轉型（蒙特利爾議定書）

summary.en: Morocco is a Party to the Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer and is implementing its HCFC phasedown schedule for Article 5 (developing) countries. R-22 (HCFC-22) is in active decline and its use in new equipment imported into Morocco is increasingly restricted; importers should not rely on R-22 for new heat-pump or split-AC equipment. R-32 (HFC-32, GWP 675) and R-410A (HFC blend, GWP 2088) are the predominant transition refrigerants currently accepted in the Moroccan market; R-32 is preferred in newer equipment due to lower GWP. Morocco has accepted the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol, which phases down HFCs; importers should anticipate future restrictions on high-GWP HFCs including R-410A. Product labels and import declarations must state the refrigerant type and charge quantity. End-of-life refrigerant recovery obligations apply to installers and service technicians.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方，正在执行第5条（发展中国家）HCFC淘汰时间表。R-22（HCFC-22）已处于主动减量阶段，进口至摩洛哥的新设备中使用R-22受到日益严格的限制；进口商不应在新型热泵或分体空调设备中依赖R-22。R-32（HFC-32，GWP 675）和R-410A（HFC混合制冷剂，GWP 2088）是目前摩洛哥市场主流的过渡制冷剂；由于GWP更低，R-32在新型设备中更受青睐。摩洛哥已批准《蒙特利尔议定书》基加利修正案，该修正案逐步淘汰HFC；进口商应预期包括R-410A在内的高GWP HFC将面临未来限制。产品标签和进口申报须注明制冷剂类型和充注量。报废制冷剂回收义务适用于安装商和服务技术人员。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥是《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方，正在執行第5條（發展中國家）HCFC淘汰時間表。R-22（HCFC-22）已處於主動減量階段，進口至摩洛哥的新設備中使用R-22受到日益嚴格的限制；進口商不應在新型熱泵或分體空調設備中依賴R-22。R-32（HFC-32，GWP 675）和R-410A（HFC混合製冷劑，GWP 2088）是目前摩洛哥市場主流的過渡製冷劑；由於GWP更低，R-32在新型設備中更受青睞。摩洛哥已批准《蒙特利爾議定書》基加利修正案，該修正案逐步淘汰HFC；進口商應預期包括R-410A在內的高GWP HFC將面臨未來限制。產品標籤和進口申報須注明製冷劑類型和充注量。報廢製冷劑回收義務適用於安裝商和服務技術人員。

standards_or_laws: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer — HCFC phasedown schedule for Article 5 Parties
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — HFC phasedown
Morocco national HCFC phaseout management plan (HPMP)
NM IEC 60335-2-40 — refrigerant type and charge labelling requirements

summary.en: China implements HCFC phasedown under the Montreal Protocol and its domestic management plans. GB 9237 provides the refrigerant safety baseline for Chinese heat pumps and refrigeration equipment, covering permissible refrigerant types, charge limits, and safety classification. China is also transitioning away from R-22 and promotes R-32 and R-410A in new equipment, consistent with its Kigali Amendment commitments for HFC phasedown. Chinese product labels are required to state refrigerant type and charge under CCC and GB standards; however, Chinese domestic refrigerant labelling and reporting formats do not automatically satisfy Moroccan import documentation requirements.
summary.zh: 中国依据《蒙特利尔议定书》及国内管理计划执行HCFC淘汰。GB 9237为中国热泵和制冷设备提供制冷剂安全基线，涵盖允许的制冷剂类型、充注量限制及安全分类。中国也在新型设备中逐步淘汰R-22，推广R-32和R-410A，与其基加利修正案HFC减排承诺一致。按CCC和GB标准要求，中国产品标签须标注制冷剂类型和充注量；但中国国内制冷剂标签和报告格式不能自动满足摩洛哥进口文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據《蒙特利爾議定書》及國內管理計劃執行HCFC淘汰。GB 9237為中國熱泵和製冷設備提供製冷劑安全基線，涵蓋允許的製冷劑類型、充注量限制及安全分類。中國也在新型設備中逐步淘汰R-22，推廣R-32和R-410A，與其基加利修正案HFC減排承諾一致。按CCC和GB標準要求，中國產品標籤須標注製冷劑類型和充注量；但中國國內製冷劑標籤和報告格式不能自動滿足摩洛哥進口文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 — refrigerant safety baseline for heat pumps and refrigeration equipment
CCC and GB 4706.32 — refrigerant type and charge labelling requirements
GB 25454 / GB/T 7725 — performance standards referencing permissible refrigerant types
China Montreal Protocol / Kigali Amendment implementation commitments

gap.en: Both Morocco and China are phasing down HCFC and transitioning to low-GWP HFC refrigerants, so the direction is aligned. However, Chinese domestic refrigerant declarations and labelling formats are not automatically accepted for Moroccan customs and import documentation. Importers must confirm: (1) the specific refrigerant used is not restricted in Morocco under current HCFC phasedown rules; (2) the product label states refrigerant type and charge quantity in a format meeting Moroccan requirements; (3) R-22 is not used in new equipment; (4) service and recovery obligations for the Moroccan market are understood. Future Kigali-driven HFC restrictions may affect R-410A products.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥和中国均在淘汰HCFC并向低GWP HFC制冷剂过渡，方向一致。但中国国内制冷剂声明和标签格式不能自动被摩洛哥海关和进口文件接受。进口商须确认：（1）所用具体制冷剂在摩洛哥当前HCFC淘汰规定下不受限制；（2）产品标签以符合摩洛哥要求的格式标注制冷剂类型和充注量；（3）新设备不使用R-22；（4）了解摩洛哥市场的维修和回收义务。未来基加利驱动的HFC限制可能影响R-410A产品。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥和中國均在淘汰HCFC並向低GWP HFC製冷劑過渡，方向一致。但中國國內製冷劑聲明和標籤格式不能自動被摩洛哥海關和進口文件接受。進口商須確認：（1）所用具體製冷劑在摩洛哥當前HCFC淘汰規定下不受限制；（2）產品標籤以符合摩洛哥要求的格式標注製冷劑類型和充注量；（3）新設備不使用R-22；（4）了解摩洛哥市場的維修和回收義務。未來基加利驅動的HFC限制可能影響R-410A產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — refrigerant must comply with Morocco HCFC phasedown rules; R-22 not permitted in new equipment; refrigerant type and charge must be labelled; end-of-life recovery obligations apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 9237 and CCC labelling requirements; CN phasedown trajectory is aligned but CN documentation formats differ from Morocco import requirements

source.publisher: UN Environment Programme (UNEP) — Ozone Secretariat, Montreal Protocol

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Directional alignment exists (both Morocco and China are phasing down HCFC and promoting R-32/R-410A), but CN refrigerant documentation must be adapted to Morocco import declaration format; R-22 must not be used in new exports; and Kigali Amendment HFC reduction obligations should be monitored for future R-410A restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 方向一致（摩洛哥和中国均在淘汰HCFC并推广R-32/R-410A），但中国制冷剂文件须适配摩洛哥进口申报格式；新出口设备不得使用R-22；应关注基加利修正案HFC减量义务对R-410A产品的未来限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 方向一致（摩洛哥和中國均在淘汰HCFC並推廣R-32/R-410A），但中國製冷劑文件須適配摩洛哥進口申報格式；新出口設備不得使用R-22；應關注基加利修正案HFC減量義務對R-410A產品的未來限制。
